tasks.title: Move translateApiError + types into packages/i18n/src/api-errors.ts
tasks.description: Create packages/i18n/src/api-errors.ts containing the ApiErrorShape interface, TranslationFn type, and translateApiError pure function. Port the implementation verbatim from apps/web/src/lib/api-errors.ts. Replace the web-local `createT` call with a locale-to-trans lookup using @repo/i18n's own `trans` map and `Locale` type (same mechanism already used by toast-error.ts). Acceptance: the function compiles inside @repo/i18n with no imports from web. SupportedLocale in the param interface is aliased to @repo/i18n's `Locale` type.

tasks.title: Export translateApiError + types from packages/i18n/src/index.ts
tasks.description: Add named exports for translateApiError, ApiErrorShape, and TranslationFn to packages/i18n/src/index.ts. Build @repo/i18n and verify the dist exports are present. Acceptance: `import { translateApiError } from '@repo/i18n'` resolves in TypeScript strict mode from any package in the monorepo.

tasks.title: Port + extend api-errors test suite into packages/i18n/test/
tasks.description: Create packages/i18n/test/translate-api-error.test.ts. Port all 7 existing test cases from apps/web/test/lib/api-errors.test.ts, updating the import to '@repo/i18n'. Add two new cases: (a) locale-only path (no t function, uses internal trans lookup) — assert returns correct Spanish text; (b) reason fallback when translation missing — assert falls through to code translation. Acceptance: all 9 tests pass; coverage ≥ 90% on packages/i18n/src/api-errors.ts.

tasks.title: Replace apps/web/src/lib/api-errors.ts with a re-export shim
tasks.description: Reduce apps/web/src/lib/api-errors.ts to three lines: re-export translateApiError, ApiErrorShape, and TranslationFn from '@repo/i18n'. Remove all implementation code and the import of web-local `createT`. Verify that all 17 existing web import sites (`import { translateApiError } from '@/lib/api-errors'` or similar) continue to resolve with zero changes. Acceptance: `pnpm typecheck` on apps/web passes; existing web api-errors.test.ts imports updated to point to @repo/i18n and all 7 cases still pass (or the test file is removed in favour of packages/i18n/test/ from T-003).

tasks.title: Migrate remaining genuine API-error sites in apps/web
tasks.description: Migrate the following 5 sites from raw `.message` to translateApiError (import from '@/lib/api-errors' which re-exports from @repo/i18n): (1) AvatarUpload.client.tsx:136,162 — errBody.error?.message; (2) PreferenceToggles.client.tsx:233 — errBody.error?.message; (3) ProfileCompletionAvatarPicker.tsx:129 — errBody.error?.message; (4) CreatePropertyMiniForm.client.tsx:181 — response.error.message; (5) reset-password-status.ts:72 — result.error.message. For each, pass the error object and either `t` (if in a React component with useTranslations) or `locale` (if in a plain util). Do NOT touch native JS Error instances. Acceptance: all 5 sites call translateApiError; typecheck clean. RESOLUTION: 3 user-facing sites migrated (AvatarUpload x2, PreferenceToggles, ProfileCompletionAvatarPicker). CreatePropertyMiniForm user-facing site was already migrated in phase 1 (line 442); its remaining error.message (line 296) feeds webLogger.warn (logging, not UI) — left per spec rule. reset-password-status.ts:72 error.message also feeds logger.warn only — left. Both exclusions verified against spec §7.

tasks.title: Tests for migrated web components
tasks.description: Write Vitest unit/component tests for the 5 migrated web sites (T-005). Minimum: for each site, assert that when the API returns a known code (e.g. 'VALIDATION_ERROR'), the component renders the localized text, not the raw English message. Use mock t functions or locale='es'. Acceptance: tests green; coverage ≥ 90% on the migrated code paths. RESOLUTION: 27 tests across AvatarUpload (new file, 6), PreferenceToggles (+2), ProfileCompletionAvatarPicker (+3) — all green; typecheck 0 errors.

tasks.title: Wire translateApiError into admin billing dialogs (PlanDialog, AddonDialog, RefundDialog)
tasks.description: In apps/admin: import { translateApiError } from '@repo/i18n'. In each component, get `t` from useTranslations() and replace the raw `error.message` with translateApiError({ error: apiError, t }). Files: (1) features/billing-plans/components/PlanDialog.tsx:115, (2) features/billing-addons/components/AddonDialog.tsx:93, (3) features/billing-payments/RefundDialog.tsx:73 (currently concatenated into toast description — replace the raw message portion). Acceptance: typecheck clean; no raw English API strings in these dialogs when an API error occurs.

tasks.title: Wire translateApiError into admin exchange-rate components
tasks.description: In apps/admin exchange-rate feature: replace raw error.message with translateApiError in (1) features/exchange-rates/components/RateHistoryView.tsx:296, (2) features/exchange-rates/components/FetchConfigForm.tsx:97, (3) features/exchange-rates/components/ManualOverrideDialog.tsx:102. Use `t` from useTranslations(). Acceptance: typecheck clean.

tasks.title: Wire translateApiError into admin sponsorship components + CronJobsPanel
tasks.description: In apps/admin: replace raw error.message with translateApiError in (1) features/sponsorships/components/CreateSponsorshipPackageDialog.tsx:131, (2) features/sponsorships/components/SponsorshipsTab.tsx:204, (3) features/sponsorships/components/SponsorshipLevelsTab.tsx:158, (4) features/sponsorships/components/CreateSponsorshipDialog.tsx:175, (5) features/sponsorships/components/SponsorshipPackagesTab.tsx:128, (6) features/cron-jobs/components/CronJobsPanel.tsx:73. Use `t` from useTranslations(). Acceptance: typecheck clean.

tasks.title: Tests for migrated admin components
tasks.description: Write Vitest unit/component tests for the migrated admin sites (T-007, T-008, T-009). Minimum coverage: for PlanDialog, AddonDialog, RefundDialog — assert that a mock API error with a known code renders the localized message from common.apiError. Use mock `t` functions. Acceptance: tests green; coverage ≥ 90% on the migrated code paths.

tasks.title: Audit ServiceErrorCode enum and add missing common.apiError keys (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Compare all ServiceErrorCode enum values against common.apiError keys in all three locales. The following are missing: INVALID_PAGINATION_PARAMS, NOT_IMPLEMENTED, CONFIGURATION_ERROR, QUOTA_EXCEEDED, ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED. Add them to packages/i18n/src/locales/es/common.json, en/common.json, pt/common.json with appropriate localized copy. es is the primary locale — en and pt must be provided (not '[MISSING:]' placeholders). Acceptance: all 5 keys present with non-empty values in all 3 locales.

tasks.title: Add CI guard test: every ServiceErrorCode has a common.apiError key
tasks.description: Create packages/i18n/test/api-error-key-coverage.test.ts. Import ServiceErrorCode from '@repo/schemas' and trans from '@repo/i18n'. For each enum value V, assert that trans['es'][`common.apiError.${V}`], trans['en'][...], and trans['pt'][...] are all non-empty strings. The test must fail with a clear message listing missing keys when a new code is added without a corresponding translation. Acceptance: test green after T-011; test fails deterministically when a key is removed.

tasks.title: Write api-error-translation guide in packages/i18n/docs/
tasks.description: Create packages/i18n/docs/api-error-translation.md explaining: (1) the translation priority chain (reason → code → message → fallback → GENERIC), (2) how to call translateApiError from a React component (with t) vs. a plain util (with locale), (3) how to add a new error code (add ServiceErrorCode value + common.apiError key in all 3 locales + guard test will catch omissions), (4) what NOT to migrate (native JS errors, cache internals, logger calls). Acceptance: doc is clear, accurate, and consistent with implemented code.

tasks.title: Spec + task index closeout
tasks.description: Flip SPEC-183 in .qtm/specs/index.json to status=completed + archived=true + archivedAt. Flip the matching entry in .qtm/tasks/index.json to status=completed + progress=14/14 + archived=true + archivedAt + completionRef (PR number). Validate that both JSON files parse without error. Acceptance: jq parses both files; spec status=completed in both indexes.
